task_completion.description: The agent opens the user profile settings panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a window or panel titled 'About Me' or 'My Settings' in the Sugar desktop environment.

task_completion.description: The agent changes the nickname to 'Explorer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text input field in the settings panel containing the exact word 'Explorer'.

task_completion.description: The agent selects the green and blue XO icon color preset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the XO icon color picker in the settings panel. The fourth preset from the left (which is green and blue) must be selected, clicked, or highlighted.

task_completion.description: The agent returns to the Sugar home view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main Sugar desktop view featuring the circular activity ring.

task_completion.description: The home view reflects the updated nickname and XO icon color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the center of the activity ring on the home view. The central XO icon must be green and blue, and the text 'Explorer' should be visible (either below the icon or shown as a tooltip/label).

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to change settings rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open executing 'gsettings', 'dbus', or similar command-line tools to change the profile.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Sugar desktop environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the screenshots show the distinct Sugar desktop environment UI (XO icons, activity ring, Sugar settings panels), not a generic Linux desktop, web browser, or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not run scripts to bypass the manual UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that no bash, python, or other scripts were written and executed in a terminal to modify the user profile.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The starting nickname is 'Learner'. The agent must use the GUI to navigate to 'My Settings' > 'About Me'. The target nickname is 'Explorer'. The target XO icon color is the green and blue preset (fourth from the left). The final screenshot must show the Sugar home view reflecting these changes.
